Resume

Eunseok Lee

Data Specialist building production-grade ML systems from data contracts to monitored deployment.

Incheon, South Korea eastlighting1@gachon.ac.kr GitHubLinkedInGoogle Scholar

Summary

Data specialist with hands-on experience in modeling, evaluation, feature pipelines, experimentation, and MLOps operations. I care about readable systems, stable metrics, and documentation surfaces that make technical decisions easy to review.

Experience

Senior Data Specialist
SignalGrid Analytics | 2023 - Present
  • Led a churn prediction platform refresh that improved alert precision by 18% after rebuilding feature quality checks.
  • Introduced model and data monitoring dashboards used by product, analytics, and platform teams.
ML Engineer
North Harbor Health AI | 2021 - 2023
  • Built training and evaluation pipelines for clinical risk models with reproducible experiment tracking.
  • Partnered with research and platform teams to move notebook prototypes into scheduled production jobs.

Selected Projects

Feature Store Quality Gates for Retention Models
Production ML Platform | 2025

Reworked feature validation and promotion rules so retention models could ship on a stable, measurable data contract.

Retrieval Evaluation Bench for Technical Support Search
Applied Research System | 2024

Built an evaluation bench for support search retrieval quality with slice-based diagnostics, benchmark sets, and deployment notes.

Skills

Data

SQL | Python | dbt | Spark | Feature Stores

AI

PyTorch | scikit-learn | XGBoost | LLM Evaluation | Experiment Tracking

Infra / MLOps

Airflow | Docker | GitHub Actions | MLflow | Kubernetes

Research

Ablation Design | Benchmarking | Technical Writing | Statistical Analysis

Research

Data-Centric Evaluation Patterns for Production ML
Internal Research Note | 2025

A practical framework for evaluating production ML systems by treating data quality, cohort stability, and review surfaces as first-class parts of the evaluation loop.

Education

M.S. in Artificial Intelligence
Korea University | 2017 - 2019

Thesis on evaluation strategies for data-efficient clinical risk prediction.

B.S. in Computer Science
Hanyang University | 2013 - 2017

Focused on machine learning systems, database design, and statistics.
